urdu transliteration text:
KARBOBALA NASEEB SE JANA NASEEB HO
KARBOBALA NASEEB SE JANA NASEEB HO
english translation text: May I get a chance to visit Karbala

urdu transliteration text: PHIR LAUT KAR WAHAAN SE NA ANA NASEEB HO
english translation text: Such that I never return from there

urdu transliteration text: AISA DARE HUSSAIN PE, SAJDA HO AAKHRI
english translation text: May my last prostration be at Imam Hussain’s door…

urdu transliteration text: PHIR MUJHKO APNA SAR NA UTHANA NASEEB HO
english translation text: Such that I never raise my head again

urdu transliteration text: PARWARDIGAR THOKRE DAR DAR KI KAB TALAQ
english translation text: O Lord! For how long will I stray from door to door?

urdu transliteration text: AB MUSTAQIL NAJAF MEIN THIKAANA NASEEB HO
english translation text: May my future abode be in Najaf forever

urdu transliteration text:
The way Ummul Baneen was blessed…
JAISA MILA NASEEB SE UMMUL BANEEN KO
AB KYA KISI KO AISA GHARANA NASEEB HO
english translation text: Will anyone be blessed with such a household now?

urdu transliteration text: JEE CHAHTA HAI SAMNE BAITHE HO PANJATAN
english translation text: It is my desire that Panjetan are seated in front of me..

urdu transliteration text: UNKI SANA UNHI KO SUNANA NASEEB HO
english translation text: Such that I can recite their praises infront of them
